title: 日本ダービーの後に・遠い背中

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... gasp...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine. I just... wasn't good enough!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I couldn't catch up to Bourbon! I have to...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I have to... work harder...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Zzz... zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her strength exhausted, she collapses before me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush forward to lend her my shoulder to rest on.
And as I do...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Her choice of words does not match the scenario
we are in.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Considering the outcome of the race, she should
have said she "lost."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is not a matter of whether she "caught up" to
me or not. Should you not correct her?
choice_data_list:
Catching up to you is what was important to
her.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: This... does not compute.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-sorry! I didn't mean cause you trouble...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There's no hope for me, is there?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm such a burden to you... And even when
racing... I can't keep up.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I have to work even harder next time.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Tell me... what race do you think Bourbon will run
in next?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Tell me... what race do you think Bourbon will run
in next?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I think you're right. Then, that means... I'm going
too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm... going to do my best. And next time... I'll
catch up to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is the final race in the Triple
Crown tour—a 3000-meter long-distance turf
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Rice Shower is a stayer, that means her
chances of victory are the highest they've ever
been!
